description: Mixed-language text — Chinese/English, Chinese/number, Chinese + formula. The segmenter auto-detects the region type, and the dispatcher routes by inline node.

cases.note: 公式 (formula) + math + 等于 (equals): blanks around math region
设 (let) + math + 为 (be) + 变量 (variable)
用 (use) + math + 表示 (denote) (表=biao3: iao final is ⠜)
Chinese + CPU acronym (doubled ⠠⠠ for whole-word capitals) + Chinese
Chinese + digit + measure word + noun; a number is its own word, so 有→3 takes a word-boundary space (every hanzi but the ordinal prefix 第 does); the hyphen/connector ⠤ binds 3个 (个's leading cell ⠛=7)
